channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: USMNT victory sparks celebrations nationwide
item.description: Americans at watch parties across the U.S. celebrated the men's national team's win over Bosnia-Herzegovina, advancing to the round of 16.

item.title: Parents accused in death of severely obese son to face competency tests
item.description: Seven-year-old Casper O'Brien weighed 255 pounds at death, which was attributed to dilated cardiomyopathy and other factors.

item.title: Olympian David Hearn indicted for alleged vandalism of Reflecting Pool
item.description: Olympian David Hearn has been indicted for allegedly destroying the lining of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.

item.title: Trump's crypto dealings and potential conflicts of interest
item.description: New financial disclosures show President Trump made $1.4 billion on crypto in 2025. Investigative financial reporter Tom Bergin discusses the implications.
